problem: Let \[g(x) = \left\{ \begin{aligned} 3x+6 & \quad \text{ if } x < 0 \\ 2x - 13 & \quad \text{ if } x \ge 0 \end{aligned} \right.\]Find all solutions to the equation $g(x) = 3.$

classified_questions.question: What is the value of $g(x)$ when $x$ is less than 0? And when $x$ is greater than or equal to 0?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Can you explain why we need to consider two separate cases in order to find the solutions to the equation $g(x) = 3$?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Let's start with the case $x < 0.$ How can we rewrite the equation $g(x) = 3$ in this case?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What steps can we take to solve this linear equation $3x + 6 = 3$? Can you show your work?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What value of $x$ did you find as a solution in the case $x < 0$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Now let's move on to the case $x \geq 0.$ How can we rewrite the equation $g(x) = 3$ in this case?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What steps can we take to solve this linear equation $2x - 13 = 3$? Can you show your work?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: What value of $x$ did you find as a solution in the case $x \geq 0$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Are there any other possible solutions to the equation $g(x) = 3$ that we haven't considered yet? How can we be sure?
classified_questions.label: b
